title: Egyptian Plant Casserole
description: A hearty, savory casserole filled with gooey cheese, eggs, and plant ingredients, inspired by Egyptian cuisine.
instructions: In a large skillet, sauté the plant ingredients until tender.
In a separate bowl, combine the savory cheese, gooey cheese, and eggs.
Add the casserole mix to the cheese mixture and stir well.
Add the melted butter to the cheese mixture and stir well.
Combine the skillet contents with the cheese mixture and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the casserole is golden brown and set.
Let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
